speaker: speaker1
text: Do you know that the dolphin is the most intelligent animal in the world ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . Dolphins have a big brain and they are very smart . They are also the fastest swimmers in the world .

speaker: speaker2
text: They are . I read a story about a dolphin saving a A from drowning in the sea .

speaker: speaker1
text: I read that story too . They seem to be able to understand men .

speaker: speaker2
text: They sure can . Maybe they can interact with men better than monkeys and apes .
